title: 10 Disciplines a Godly Man Builds Before 30
caption:
Before life demands them, build them anyway.

1. The Bible before the phone. Every morning.
2. A body he trains consistently.
3. One honest confession to one honest man.
4. The habit of arriving early.
5. The word kept when it costs him.
6. A budget, run on paper every week.
7. Ten minutes of silence. No device.
8. A skill or trade he can point to.
9. A real apology, made in person. No caveats. Just: I was wrong.
10. One brother who knows his actual sin.

Not the polished version. The real one.

The man who builds these in his 20s isn't more disciplined than everyone else. He just decided early to build the kind of life he'd want to inherit at 35.

Save this and send it to one younger man in your life.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #before30 #formation #christianity
